name: Absolute Mortgage & Lending
description_short: Dallas-based mortgage lender offering conventional, FHA, VA, USDA, construction, and renovation loans with personalized service and multilingual support.
description_long:
Absolute Mortgage & Lending is a mortgage lender based in Dallas, Texas, operating under NMLS# 1910591 as a division of AML Funding, LLC. The company has been in business since at least 2016 and maintains a physical office at 4230 Lyndon B Johnson Freeway, Suite 626. They serve clients through phone (972-233-8800), email (info@absoluteml.com), and their website at absoluteml.com.

The company offers a comprehensive range of mortgage products including conventional loans, FHA loans, VA loans for veterans and service members, USDA loans, construction financing, renovation loans, reverse mortgages, and FHA loans without tax return requirements. They provide services for both home purchases and refinancing, with a stated focus on guiding clients through the entire loan process. The company emphasizes personalized service, with loan officers available for consultations, pre-approval, and quote requests through their website.

Absolute Mortgage distinguishes itself through several operational practices: multilingual support (English, Vietnamese, and Spanish), emphasis on personalized customer relationships ("you'll never be treated like a number"), quick communication and transaction processing, and demonstrated expertise with diverse lending situations. Client testimonials highlight specific loan officers (Khai Nguyen, Hao Huynh, Anthony Nguyen, Melissa Bui) and emphasize on-time or early closing, responsiveness, and problem-solving on difficult deals. The company markets itself to real estate professionals and individual homebuyers alike.

Absolute Mortgage appears to be a legitimate, regulated mortgage lender with proper NMLS licensing and standard compliance disclosures available on their website. However, detailed information about rates, terms, fees, approval requirements, and specific loan products is not publicly available on their website—customers must request quotes or contact loan officers directly. Client reviews appear genuine and specific but represent a limited sample. No third-party rating data or complaint history is visible from the website alone.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Multiple loan product types available: conventional, FHA, VA, USDA, construction, renovation, and reverse mortgages
Multilingual support in English, Vietnamese, and Spanish, likely serving diverse Dallas-area communities
Specific named loan officers with documented client testimonials highlighting reliability and on-time closings
Emphasis on personalized service and treating clients as individuals rather than transactions
Quick communication and responsiveness noted consistently in client reviews
Demonstrated ability to handle complex or difficult lending situations
Proper NMLS licensing (1910591) with published privacy statements, disclosures, and compliance resources
cons: No rates, fees, APR ranges, or specific loan terms published on website—requires direct contact for pricing
Limited online transparency about approval requirements, credit score minimums, or loan-to-value ratios
Client testimonials come only from real estate professionals and a few individuals; no independent third-party reviews or ratings visible
No FAQ section, blog, or educational resources beyond a generic 'loan process guide' link with no preview
Website content is minimal and does not explain differences between loan products or specific eligibility criteria
best_for: Veterans and active service members seeking VA loans in the Dallas area
Home buyers and refinancers who prefer personalized service with a named loan officer
Spanish and Vietnamese-speaking borrowers seeking multilingual mortgage support
Borrowers with complex lending situations or non-standard financial profiles
diagnosis: Absolute Mortgage & Lending is best suited for homebuyers and refinancers in the Dallas area seeking personalized mortgage service, particularly veterans, Spanish/Vietnamese speakers, or those with complex lending needs. The main caveat is that rates, fees, and specific terms are not available online—you must contact them directly for pricing and comparison shopping.
services: FHA loans without tax return requirements
VA loans for veterans and service members
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 4230 Lyndon B Johnson Fwy #626, Dallas, TX 75244
